message:
feat(fcp-e2e): add revocation test infrastructure with token and issuer flows

Add 605 lines of E2E test infrastructure for capability revocation:

- RevocationTarget enum (CapabilityToken, IssuerKey) with reason codes,
  numeric codes, and scenario metadata
- IssuedCapabilityToken and RevocationArtifacts structs for test state
- Token issuance, revocation execution, and denial verification helpers
- Revocation propagation timing assertions
- Decision receipt and audit event validation
- Both token-level and issuer-key-level revocation scenarios
- Recovery flow testing after revocation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
